metadata.executive_summary: For Q1 2025, Alphabet Inc. reported revenues of $90.234 billion, a 12% year-over-year increase. Net income reached $34.540 billion, reflecting a 46% growth compared to Q1 2024. Diluted EPS was $2.81, up 49% from the previous year. The company achieved an income from operations of $30.606 billion, a 20% increase year-over-year. Significant growth in other income, net, contributed to the overall performance. Alphabet continues to demonstrate robust financial health and operational efficiency.
